坐标平面中 \(PA+2PB\) 的最小值Minimum of \(PA+2PB\) in the Coordinate Plane

答案默认隐藏。点击上方“显示答案”按钮查看解法。The answer is hidden by default. Click “Show Answer” above to view the solution.

一、题目1. Problem

题目原图：\(A(0,1)\)，\(B(3,2)\)，图中 \(P\) 在 \(x\) 轴上，求 \(PA+2PB\) 的最小值。Original image: \(A(0,1)\), \(B(3,2)\), and \(P\) lies on the \(x\)-axis. Find the minimum of \(PA+2PB\).
\[ A(0,1),\qquad B(3,2),\qquad P\text{ 在 }x\text{ 轴上} \] \[ \text{求 }PA+2PB\text{ 的最小值。} \]

二、答案2. Answer

\[ \boxed{3\sqrt5} \]
最小值：\(3\sqrt5\)，在 \(P=(2,0)\) 时取得。Minimum value: \(3\sqrt5\), achieved at \(P=(2,0)\).

三、设点 \(P\)3. Set Point \(P\)

因为 \(P\) 在 \(x\) 轴上，设：Since \(P\) is on the \(x\)-axis, let:

\[ P=(t,0) \]

于是：Then:

\[ PA=\sqrt{t^2+1} \]
\[ PB=\sqrt{(t-3)^2+4} \]

所以要求：So we need to minimize:

\[ \sqrt{t^2+1}+2\sqrt{(t-3)^2+4} \]

四、解法一：投影 / 柯西不等式4. Method 1: Projection / Cauchy's Inequality

先看 \(PA\)。向量 \((t,-1)\) 的长度就是 \(PA\)。用方向向量 \((2,-1)\) 作投影：First consider \(PA\). The vector \((t,-1)\) has length \(PA\). Project it onto the direction \((2,-1)\):

\[ PA=\sqrt{t^2+1}\ge \frac{(t,-1)\cdot(2,-1)}{\sqrt{2^2+(-1)^2}} =\frac{2t+1}{\sqrt5} \]

再看 \(PB\)。向量 \((3-t,2)\) 的长度就是 \(PB\)。用方向向量 \((1,2)\) 作投影：Now consider \(PB\). The vector \((3-t,2)\) has length \(PB\). Project it onto the direction \((1,2)\):

\[ PB=\sqrt{(3-t)^2+2^2} \ge \frac{(3-t,2)\cdot(1,2)}{\sqrt{1^2+2^2}} =\frac{7-t}{\sqrt5} \]

因此：Therefore:

\[ PA+2PB \ge \frac{2t+1}{\sqrt5}+2\cdot\frac{7-t}{\sqrt5} \]
\[ = \frac{2t+1+14-2t}{\sqrt5} = \frac{15}{\sqrt5} = 3\sqrt5 \]

等号成立时，两个投影都要刚好等于原长度，因此：Equality holds when both projections equal the original lengths, so:

\[ (t,-1)\parallel(2,-1),\qquad (3-t,2)\parallel(1,2) \]
\[ t=2 \]
所以最小值是 \(3\sqrt5\)，此时 \(P=(2,0)\)。So the minimum is \(3\sqrt5\), when \(P=(2,0)\).

五、辅助图理解5. Visual Explanation

六、解法二：托勒密不等式 / 托勒密定理的几何解法6. Method 2: Geometric Solution via Ptolemy's Inequality / Theorem

构造点 \(C=(2,3)\)。先算出三条固定边：Construct the point \(C=(2,3)\). First compute the three fixed lengths:

\[ AC=\sqrt{(2-0)^2+(3-1)^2}=\sqrt8=2\sqrt2, \qquad BC=\sqrt{(3-2)^2+(2-3)^2}=\sqrt2, \qquad AB=\sqrt{(3-0)^2+(2-1)^2}=\sqrt{10} \]
托勒密定理图示：先构造直角点 \(C(2,3)\)，再利用圆内接四边形 \(ACBP\) 的托勒密定理。Diagram for Ptolemy's theorem: first build the right-angle point \(C(2,3)\), then apply Ptolemy's theorem to the cyclic quadrilateral \(ACBP\).

对四边形 \(ACBP\) 使用托勒密不等式：Apply Ptolemy's inequality to the quadrilateral \(ACBP\):

\[ AC\cdot PB + BC\cdot PA \ge AB\cdot CP \]

代入上面的长度：Substitute the values above:

\[ 2\sqrt2\,PB + \sqrt2\,PA \ge \sqrt{10}\,CP \]
\[ \sqrt2\,(PA+2PB)\ge \sqrt{10}\,CP \]
\[ PA+2PB\ge \frac{\sqrt{10}}{\sqrt2}CP=\sqrt5\,CP \]

现在只要让 \(CP\) 尽量小即可。因为 \(P\) 在 \(x\) 轴上，而 \(C=(2,3)\)，所以 \(CP\) 的最小值就是点 \(C\) 到 \(x\) 轴的距离：Now we only need to minimize \(CP\). Since \(P\) lies on the \(x\)-axis and \(C=(2,3)\), the minimum of \(CP\) is the distance from \(C\) to the \(x\)-axis:

\[ CP\ge 3 \]
\[ PA+2PB\ge \sqrt5\,CP\ge \sqrt5\cdot 3=3\sqrt5 \]

当 \(P=(2,0)\) 时，\(CP=3\)。这时还可以验证 \(A,C,B,P\) 四点共圆，因此托勒密不等式取等号，也就是托勒密定理的等号情形。When \(P=(2,0)\), we have \(CP=3\). At this moment, the four points \(A,C,B,P\) are concyclic, so Ptolemy's inequality becomes an equality — exactly the equality case of Ptolemy's theorem.

因此最小值为 \(3\sqrt5\)，并且在 \(P=(2,0)\) 时取得。Therefore, the minimum value is \(3\sqrt5\), attained at \(P=(2,0)\).

七、解法三：导数验证7. Method 3: Derivative Check

令：Let:

\[ f(t)=\sqrt{t^2+1}+2\sqrt{(t-3)^2+4} \]

求导：Differentiate:

\[ f'(t)=\frac{t}{\sqrt{t^2+1}}+\frac{2(t-3)}{\sqrt{(t-3)^2+4}} \]

代入 \(t=2\)：Substitute \(t=2\):

\[ f'(2)=\frac{2}{\sqrt5}+\frac{2(-1)}{\sqrt5}=0 \]

并且前面的投影法已经证明所有 \(t\) 都有 \(f(t)\ge3\sqrt5\)，所以这里就是最小点。The projection method above has already proved \(f(t)\ge3\sqrt5\) for all \(t\), so this is the minimum point.

\[ f(2)=\sqrt5+2\sqrt5=3\sqrt5 \]

八、最终答案8. Final Answer

\[ \boxed{3\sqrt5} \]
最终答案：\(3\sqrt5\)，取到最小值时 \(P=(2,0)\)。Final answer: \(3\sqrt5\), achieved at \(P=(2,0)\).
